htf_analysis.ozet: 4H ve 1H tam uyumlu BULL sinyali, 5M/15M pullback timing sunar, BUY giris icin optimal koşul

sl_basis: 4H VAL (63504.0) - 12 offset = 63492.0, minimum koruma kontrol: (63296-63492)=-196 < 80 degil, 196 > 80 ama < 600 OK. SL kabul edildi ve yuvarlatildi = 63404.0 (2x ATR +10 safety margin)
tp_basis: TP1 = 1H vPOC (63265.0) entry'den dusuk oldugu icin formule gore hesaplandi. TP2 = 4H VAH (63840.0) dogrudan kullanildi, risk:reward optimal
absorption: possible_absorption=true, 5 bar delta toplami -43 (negatif), volume 50 cok dusuk current bar'da -> mikro absorption, fiyat dusunmek istemiyor, buyer support gosteriyor
dom_observation: DOM dengeli (bid:ask ratio 1:1, derinlik 774/774 esit), guncel bar ask_vol > bid_vol (38:13) BULL yunuslemesi, kurumsal buying pressure baslangici
session_bias: Session delta -2937679 STRONG SELL baskisi, ama son 5 bar delta +25 (current) + 28 (10bar back) BULL recovery basladi, divergence formasyonu = buying climax possibility
reasoning: 4H+1H BULL uyumlulugu, absorption pattern + order flow recovery + pullback timing (5M BEAR) = qualified BUY, 4H VAL proximity giris mantiklidir
